hero_subtitle: SFTY connects and normalizes KYT provider outputs into one operational layer, helping VASPs manage wallet risk aggregation, streamline case workflows and preserve audit-ready evidence.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow

problem_title: KYT provider outputs lack unified context
problem_description: Compliance teams struggle to aggregate and interpret disparate KYT provider data effectively. This fragmentation creates delays, manual reconciliations, and weakened audit readiness across transaction monitoring and wallet risk workflows.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY aggregates and normalizes KYT provider data, linking wallet risk, transaction details, alerts and review cases into a unified workflow that streamlines compliance operations and strengthens audit evidence.
workflow_title: From wallet risk to case evidence
workflow_description: SFTY aggregates wallet risk signals from multiple KYT providers, routes alerts into cases, supports review and records evidence for compliance and reporting purposes.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Beyond KYT outputs. One compliance layer
why_sfty_description: SFTY aggregates and normalizes KYT provider data into a unified operating layer that enables structured reviews, case management, decision tracking and audit-ready evidence.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports VASPs with a controlled compliance layer that consolidates KYT provider outputs into audit-ready evidence and scalable enterprise deployment workflows.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for KYT compliance teams?
faq_1_answer: SFTY provides KYT compliance teams a connected layer to aggregate wallet and transaction risk signals into structured workflows, cases, decisions and regulatory evidence.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY handle KYT provider outputs?
faq_2_answer: SFTY normalizes and connects fragmented KYT alerts and wallet risk data into consistent cases, enabling compliance teams to review, triage and respond within one platform.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready KYT evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves wallet risk scores, alert details, decision logs and evidence packages to support audit readiness and compliance review for transaction monitoring.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate multiple KYT providers?
faq_4_answer: Yes, SFTY can connect and orchestrate outputs from multiple KYT and blockchain analytics providers into one operational compliance layer without disruption.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace existing KYT providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY sits above KYT providers to structure their outputs into workflows and evidence rather than replacing the underlying analytics or monitoring tools.
final_title: Connect KYT provider outputs into reviewable cases
final_description: Explore how SFTY turns KYT data into structured workflows, linking wallet risk, alerts and audit-ready evidence for VASPs.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
